title: Point cloud loading — spinner and progress indicator visible
capture_instructions: Capture the application immediately after selecting the Queens Campus (Segmented) point cloud, during the loading phase. A spinner or loading indicator must be visible (either in the sidebar Point Cloud section or overlaid on the viewport). The viewport may show a partial point cloud with low-detail tiles already visible. Status bar may show a low point count or loading text.
ui_state: Point cloud loading in progress, spinner visible, Settings tab open

annotations.label: Loading spinner in Point Cloud section
Viewport — partial/low-detail point cloud tiles visible
Status bar — loading or low point count
